A.rationale: Correct chunking, ValueError on n<=0, empty-list works. Docstring claims 'positive integer' but code only checks <=0, not int. Generator narration adds bulk.

B.rationale: Correct, idiomatic; isinstance+<=0 guard matches docstring exactly. Tightest answer, concise edge-case notes, no over-narration. No false claims.

C.rationale: Same robust guard as B plus genuinely useful usage examples and an honest docstring caveat. Slightly longer but every line earns its place.

notes: All correct with same core logic. B and C have stronger int validation matching docstring; A's check is weaker. B is tightest; C adds useful examples. B edges out on signal-per-token.
